'''βàöh-ng-n-d''' ('''kahangnedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyk|lyk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyk|lyk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöh-ng-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| kahangnedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihangnedoko|thihangnedoko]] || [[word:jihangnedoko|jihangnedoko]] || [[word:shihangnedoko|shihangnedoko]] || [[word:kihangnedoko|kihangnedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
